entity.label: Shimri
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of one of the “valiant men” of David’s armies (1 Chr. 11:45).

nodes.label: Shimri
nodes.description: The father of one of the “valiant men” of David’s armies (1 Chr. 11:45).

nodes.label: Jediael
nodes.description: A Shimrite, one of David’s bodyguard (1 Chr. 11:45). Probably same as in 12:20.

verses.text: Jediael the son of Shimri, and Joha his brother, the Tizite,
